# Daily AI dev briefing — 2026-04-11

## News

- **Claude Mythos Preview ships via Project Glasswing** — https://www.neuralbuddies.com/p/ai-news-recap-april-10-2026 — Anthropic released a security-focused Claude variant deployed through a 40+ company partnership (Microsoft, Amazon, Apple, Google, NVIDIA, CrowdStrike). Reported 83.1% on CyberGym (vs 66.6% Opus 4.6) and 93.9% on SWE-bench (vs 80.8%). The week's Mythos backlash has flipped to a controlled enterprise rollout.
- **Advisor Strategy lands on the Messages API** — https://llm-stats.com/llm-updates — Anthropic shipped the Opus-as-advisor pattern: pair Opus 4.6 with a cheaper Sonnet/Haiku executor, gain +2.7pp on SWE-bench Multilingual at 11.9% lower per-task cost.
- **OpenAI + Anthropic + Google form anti-distillation alliance** — https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-04-06/openai-anthropic-google-unite-to-combat-model-copying-in-china — Sharing attack patterns through the Frontier Model Forum to detect adversarial distillation. Named targets: DeepSeek, Moonshot, MiniMax.
- **Anthropic locks 3.5 GW of TPU capacity with Google + Broadcom** — https://techcrunch.com/2026/04/07/anthropic-compute-deal-google-broadcom-tpus/ — 1 GW in 2026 and 3.5 GW of next-gen TPUs in 2027.
- **Mistral Small 4 + Voxtral TTS** — Small 4 is a 119B unified model (instruction + reasoning + multimodal in a single checkpoint).
- **Google TurboQuant: training-free 16→3-bit KV cache compression** — https://hackaday.com/2026/04/09/turboquant-reducing-llm-memory-usage-with-vector-quantization/ — Vector-quantization approach that shrinks KV cache 6× with zero quality loss and 8× faster attention on H100.

## Research & Papers

- **Memento-Skills: agents that rewrite their own skills without retraining** — https://venturebeat.com/orchestration/new-framework-lets-ai-agents-rewrite-their-own-skills-without-retraining-the — Treats skills as mutable external memory rather than frozen weights. Reinforces the LLM-wiki / Skills paradigm trend.
- **ParetoHqD: fast offline multi-objective alignment** — AAAI 2026 main track.
- **Semantic Token Clustering for single-pass uncertainty quantification** — Estimates model uncertainty from one generation.
- **Think, Act, Build: zero-shot 3D visual grounding via VLMs** — CVPR 2026.

## Agents & Tooling

- **Hugging Face Transformers v5 goes fully multimodal** — https://huggingface.co/blog/multimodal-sentence-transformers — v5.4 unifies text, image, audio, and video behind one API. HF moved to weekly releases.
- **TRL v1.0: unified post-training stack** — https://www.marktechpost.com/2026/04/01/hugging-face-releases-trl-v1-0-a-unified-post-training-stack-for-sft-reward-modeling-dpo-and-grpo-workflows/
- **Google Colab MCP server** — https://developers.googleblog.com/announcing-the-colab-mcp-server-connect-any-ai-agent-to-google-colab/ — Any MCP client can now drive a Colab notebook.
- **WordPress Playground MCP** — Agents can spin up a full WordPress instance locally over WebSocket.
- **AMD PACE for LLM inference on EPYC**
- **CrewAI v1.11.0** — Flow introspection via `flow_structure()`, HITL resume, native MCP + A2A support.

## GitHub Trending

- **milla-jovovich/mempalace** (5,871★/day) — Highest-scoring AI memory system on current benchmarks. Python. ~41k★.
- **JuliusBrussee/caveman** (2,047★/day) — Claude Code skill rewriting prompts into caveman-style English, ~65% token reduction. Python. 16k★.
- **Gitlawb/openclaude** (1,870★/day) — Open-source coding-agent CLI supporting 200+ models through a single harness. TypeScript. 20k★.
- **HKUDS/OpenHarness** (794★/day) — Open Agent Harness from HKU Data Science lab with reference personal agent (Ohmo). Python. 8.7k★.
- **garrytan/gbrain** (578★/day) — Opinionated "agent brain" layering on top of OpenClaw/Hermes. TypeScript. 4k★.
- **nashsu/llm_wiki** (167★/day) — Cross-platform desktop app converting documents into a persistent, agent-queryable wiki. Direct implementation of Karpathy's LLM-wiki proposal.
- **PrathamLearnsToCode/paper2code** (95★/day) — Agent skill that takes an arXiv paper and produces working code.
- **kessler/gemma-gem** (91★/day) — Gemma 4 running entirely on-device via WebGPU. TypeScript.
- **coleam00/claude-memory-compiler** (89★/day) — Compiles codebase-interaction history into evolving Claude Code memory layer. Python.
- **sdyckjq-lab/llm-wiki-skill** (73★/day) — Shell-packaged Claude skill implementing the Karpathy LLM-wiki pattern.

## X/Twitter Commentary

- @karpathy — "The growing gap in understanding of AI capability: the free-tier ChatGPT experience is shaping mainstream views, underestimating agentic systems by a wide margin." 18.7K♥
- @karpathy — "LLM simulators as a tractable path to 'brain upload' — a lossy/approximate upload via LLM simulation is likely achievable much sooner than any exotic neuroscience route." 2.6K♥
- @simonw — "OpenAI's voice mode runs on a much older and weaker model than the text frontier. The counterintuitive consequence: the voice you talk to is not the smartest AI available." 1.5K♥
- @fchollet — "Symmetry is a compression operator in physics. Scientific models are useful precisely because they exploit internal symmetries of the universe." 1.5K♥
- @emollick — "Jagged intelligence is harder to deal with in AI than in humans: the weaknesses are not intuitive, every frontier LLM has similar gaps, and the frontier keeps moving — so your mental model is always stale." 288♥
- @hardmaru — "Neural Computer: take video generation architectures and retrain them as World Models that simulate actual computer interfaces, not just natural scenes." 483♥

## Learning & Resources

- **Context Engineering: the complete guide (Supermemory, April 2026)** — https://blog.supermemory.ai/what-is-context-engineering-complete-guide/ — Treats prompt engineering as a subset of context engineering: memory, retrieved docs, tool outputs, conversation state, user profile.
- **Claude Code: senior engineer system tutorial** — https://blog.devgenius.io/claude-code-tutorial-build-a-senior-engineer-system-with-claude-md-2026-288030f9b58b — Four-layer setup: CLAUDE.md root, slash commands, domain-specialist skills, MCP integrations.
- **Running 70B models on 24GB GPUs: quantization guide** — https://dasroot.net/posts/2026/04/running-70b-parameter-models-24gb-gpus-quantization-guide/

## Signal

- **Memory infrastructure is now the dominant agent-tooling theme.** mempalace, claude-memory-compiler, llm_wiki, llm-wiki-skill, and Memento-Skills all hit trending or research feeds in the same 48-hour window. The market is consolidating around "external, mutable, agent-owned knowledge" rather than longer context windows.
- **KV cache compression is the next inference battleground.** TurboQuant (Google, 3-bit, training-free) arrives the same week Flash Attention 4 claims 1,605 TFLOPs/s on Blackwell. Serving cost for long-context workloads could move ~5× in a quarter.
- **Advisor + harness patterns are productizing simultaneously.** Anthropic shipped Advisor on the API, Microsoft Agent Framework 1.0 landed, and the OpenClaw/Hermes harness repos keep trending. The "one smart planner + many cheap executors" topology is the architectural default for Q2 2026.
